# Joyfull Wedding

## Project

Joyfull Wedding est un site vitrine premium développé pour une agence spécialisée dans l'organisation de mariages.

L'objectif est de présenter les services de l'agence, inspirer confiance, valoriser les réalisations et inciter les visiteurs à prendre contact.

---

## Tech Stack

- React.js
- TypeScript
- Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- Lucide React
- Responsive Design
- Mobile First

---

## Design Principles

- Premium UI
- Elegant
- Minimalist
- Luxury
- Smooth Animations
- High Conversion
- Excellent UX
- Accessibility
- Performance

---

## Sections

1. Hero
2. About
3. Services
4. Gallery
5. Testimonials
6. Contact
7. Footer

---

## Components

src/components/

- Navbar.tsx
- Hero.tsx
- About.tsx
- Services.tsx
- Gallery.tsx
- Testimonials.tsx
- Contact.tsx
- Footer.tsx

---

## Assets

Images are located inside:

public/assets/

including:

- hero
- about
- gallery
- testimonials
- logo
- icons

---

## Coding Guidelines

- Functional Components
- Strict TypeScript
- Reusable Components
- Clean Architecture
- Maintainable Code
- Semantic HTML
- Accessible UI
- Optimized Performance
- No UI Framework except Tailwind CSS
- Lucide React for icons
- SVG for custom illustrations

---

## UI/UX

Every section must:

- be responsive
- have smooth transitions
- respect visual hierarchy
- maintain consistent spacing
- use premium typography
- include subtle animations
- keep accessibility in mind

---

## Objective

Create a premium wedding agency website that inspires elegance, emotion, trust and maximizes contact requests.

The project follows modern React best practices and focuses on performance, scalability and maintainability.
